nasb.text: Alas for the day! For the day of the Lord is near, And it will come as destruction from the Almighty.

esv.text: Alas for the day! For the day of the Lord is near, and as destruction from the Almighty it comes.

cnv.text: 哀哉那日！ 因為耶和華的日子臨近了； 那日來到，好像毀滅從全能者臨到一樣。

ccb.text: 太可怕了！耶和华的日子近了， 那是全能者施行毁灭的日子。
